rules.text: Ensure numpy is imported as np.
Use only level three (###) or lower headers for all document section titles.
Synthesize summaries, eliminate redundant definitions, constrain section proportions, and ensure technical documentation includes all constants.
Restrict documents to four primary headers, use objective language, and prioritize robust narrative content.
Exclude programming code blocks and avoid overused, formulaic jargon in non-technical curriculum contexts.
Mandatorily include a practical, non-code activity that applies core concepts within the application section.
Ensure all consecutive model evaluations use stateless requests or cleared session history.
Use precise technical terminology, maintain an analytical tone, and explicitly distinguish internal probability from reliability.
Ensure practical sections require programmatic implementation and code-based solutions rather than manual research tasks.
Use only tertiary headers, maintain objective tone, avoid formulaic phrases, and frame code conceptually.
Restrict headers to mandatory sections, embed concrete implementation examples, and link to capstone projects.
Align curriculum content strictly with defined architectural frameworks, specific assessment criteria, and required terminology.
Restrict definitions to core sections, include practical examples, and provide step-by-step implementation exercises.
Always decouple agent reasoning from the external governance harness and define clear mastery evidence.
Include all required content, avoid sub-headers, prevent concept repetition, and integrate code-based implementation exercises.
Specify fire classifications, extinguisher limitations, and distinguish immediate rescue actions from preventive maintenance procedures.
Eliminate formulaic corporate jargon, enforce section word limits, and strictly align content with curriculum objectives.
Avoid phrases like serves as the foundation, include technical limitations, and specify additive caveats.
Separate theoretical mechanisms from procedural workflows, eliminate redundant filler, and include all required parameters.
Use validated depth gauges or reference bars, avoid oil, and define meaningful measurement tolerances.
Use precise technical terminology, mandate equipment calibration over manual correction, and correctly identify measurement errors.
Explicitly mandate a storage gap between micrometer faces to prevent corrosion and surface damage.
Distinguish between main scale and sub-scale graduations and specify precise mechanical storage positions.
Verify technical accuracy of hardware terminology and scale positioning against official engineering reference standards.
Qualify technical specifications, document all scale-reading variables, and mandate pre-use equipment verification procedures.
Place maintenance procedures exclusively in dedicated sections and limit section length to prescribed proportions.
Eliminate tables, avoid formulaic professional jargon, and restrict introductions to high-level thematic importance.
Replace theoretical descriptions with concrete, actionable steps and avoid prohibited terminology.
Use single-hash headers, avoid forbidden terminology, maintain strict semantic context, and prohibit summary repetition.
Strictly adhere to specified formatting constraints, eliminate prohibited terminology, and ensure content remains purely instructional.
Exclude prohibited phrases, maintain clinical tone, and omit code blocks entirely.
Exclude conceptual definitions from introductions and mandate explicit comparative summaries of required stack components.
Adhere strictly to four headings, exclude prohibited terminology, and incorporate all mandatory feature requirements.
Prioritize actionable, technical requirements over abstract narrative descriptions to ensure implementation precision.
Integrate the slider tool, remove formulaic phrases, and maintain exactly four main headers.
Categorize features via slider tool, strictly avoiding prohibited phrases and purely theoretical descriptive text.
Eliminate tutorial-style instructions and prohibited metaphors; prioritize objective, descriptive, academic terminology throughout the text.
Embed required assets as text and include explicit trade-off analysis within all technical specifications.
Remove redundant theory, eliminate sub-header punctuation, and detail AI’s specific stack recommendation logic.
Replace all procedural introductions with direct imperatives to eliminate fluff and prohibited terminology.
Base all design decisions on quantifiable user behavior and objectives rather than subjective preference.
Mandate adherence to specific prompt-defined technical features and precise formatting constraints in all submissions.
Remove prohibited phrases, avoid redundancy, ensure required content inclusion, and use bold styling headers.
Strictly eliminate all repetitive definitions and prohibited phrases while avoiding unnecessary code block usage.
Verify all structural, stylistic, and behavioral dependencies before modifying any interface component.
Avoid corporate tropes; use precise architectural terminology and maintain a strict narrative, non-list format.
Remove H1/H2 headers, eliminate formulaic phrases, and ensure summaries contain only unique new insights.
Omit code blocks and jargon, strictly adhere to header formatting, and include mandatory follow-up questions.
Include required AI-generated SQL code blocks while strictly avoiding prohibited formulaic business jargon.
Prioritize modular component integration through incremental, validated development steps, avoiding jargon and structural nesting.
Map user requirements to n8n email workflows using strictly defined AI system development roles.
Align content strictly with source constraints and maintain curriculum structure without adding external requirements.
Eliminate all redundant feature lists and marketing-style adjectives to ensure purely analytical, non-repetitive documentation.
Prioritize precise, technical language and avoid repetitive phrasing to maintain professional brevity and clarity.
Maintain academic prose, exclude implementation specifics, and synthesize findings without repeating core procedural steps.
Draft concise content strictly excluding core concept definitions, prohibited phrases, and code blocks.
Link AI analysis of diffs to risk identification while strictly separating introduction from concepts.
Demonstrate AI threat mapping and fail-closed implementation through descriptive, non-code procedural explanations.
Mandate specific code examples and rigorous formatting for all actionable security checklists.
Integrate application context naturally and replace unauthorized code blocks with standard bulleted lists.
Eliminate all header syntax, replace jargon with academic terminology, and exclude code-like formatting.
Mandate explicit AI tasks for configuration, comparison, and documentation while avoiding prohibited phrasing.
Adhere strictly to permitted structural headers, mandatory content requirements, and descriptive, non-formulaic technical prose.
Prioritize data source selection while eliminating formulaic phrasing, redundant definitions, and prohibited code formatting.
Eliminate formulaic transitions and nested lists to maintain strict professional stylistic compliance.
Restrict content to requested headers and excise redundant theoretical explanations or forbidden terminology.
Prohibit code blocks and sub-lists to maintain strict adherence to authorized structural requirements.
Strictly adhere to curriculum definitions; exclude unsupported classifications and clinical medical procedures.
Exclude tables and bulleted lists; ensure workshop exercises remain distinct from core conversion instructions.
Require independent trials and analysis of variance, rather than averaging fixed-position measurements.
Require tactile drag calibration and scale-mark alignment, avoiding physical end-stops and gravity-based settings.
Verify technical claims against instrument function and include concrete examples for all mandated calculations.
Loosen the primary slider lock before engaging the fine adjustment mechanism to ensure precision.
Strictly limit content to provided curriculum; omit external technical specifications and unverified procedural steps.
